dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7534 IH: Contract Our Veterans Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fine (for himself, Mr. Van Orden, Mr. Donalds, and Mr. Hunt) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Small Business

form.official-title: To amend the Small Business Act to establish a goal for participation by small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans in procurement contracts, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Contract Our Veterans Act of 2026.

section.header: Agency contracting goals for small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans
section.text: The Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 631 et seq.) is amended by inserting after section 36A the following new section:

section.header: Small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans

subsection.text: In this section, the term contracting officer has the meaning given such term in section 2101 of title 41, United States Code.

subsection.header: Sole source contracts for contracts above simplified acquisition threshold
subsection.text: A contracting officer may award a contract to a small business concern owned and controlled by veterans using procedures other than competitive procedures if—

paragraph.text: such concern is determined to be a responsible source with respect to performance of such contract;
the anticipated award price of the contract (including options) will not exceed the amounts specified in section 36(c)(2) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 657f(c)(2)); and
the contracting officer determines the contract award can be made at a fair and reasonable price that offers best value to the United States.

subsection.text: A contracting officer shall award contracts on the basis of competition restricted to small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans if the contracting officer has a reasonable expectation that two or more small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans will submit offers and that the award can be made at a fair and reasonable price that offers best value to the United States.

A small business concern may be awarded a contract under this section only if the small business concern and the veteran owner of the small business concern are listed in the database described in section 36(f)(1) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 657f(f)(1)).

section.header: Governmentwide goals and reporting requirements for small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans

subsection.text: Section 15(g) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 644(g)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking and small business concerns owned and controlled by women and inserting , small business concerns owned and controlled by women, and small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans each place it appears;
in paragraph (1)(A), by adding at the end the following new clause:

clause.text: The Governmentwide goal for participation by small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans shall be established at not less than 5 percent of the total value of all prime contract and subcontract awards for each fiscal year.

paragraph.text: in paragraph (2)(A), by striking and by small business concerns owned and controlled by women and inserting by small business concerns owned and controlled by women, and by small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans,.

subsection.text: Section 15(h)(2) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 644(h)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (E)—

subparagraph.text: in clauses (i)(VI), (ii)(VII), (iii)(VIII), and (iv)(VIII), by inserting small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans after small business concerns owned and controlled by women,;
in clause (vii)(VI), by striking and at the end;

in clause (viii)(X), by inserting small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans after small business concerns owned and controlled by socially and economically disadvantaged individuals,; and
by adding at the end the following new clause:

clause.text: small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans—

subclause.text: through competitions restricted to small business concerns;
through competitions restricted to small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans;

that were purchased by another entity after the initial contract was awarded and as a result of the purchase, would no longer be deemed to be small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans for purposes of the initial contract; and

that were awarded using a procurement method that restricted competition to small business concerns owned and controlled by service-disabled veterans, qualified HUBZone small business concerns, small business concerns owned and controlled by socially and economically disadvantaged individuals, small business concerns owned and controlled by women, or a subset of any such concerns; and

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (F), by striking and small business concerns owned and controlled by women and inserting , small business concerns owned and controlled by women, and small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans.

section.header: Participation in Federal procurement by small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans

subsection.text: Section 4(g)(1) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 633(g)(1))—

paragraph.text: in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking and 36 and inserting 36, and 36B;
in subparagraph (A)(v), by striking 36, and and inserting 36, 36B, and; and
in subparagraph (D), by striking 36, or and inserting 36, 36B, or.

subsection.text: Section 4(h)(1) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 633(g)(1)) in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking and 36 and inserting 36, and 36B.
Section 8(a)(17)(A) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 637(a)(17)(A)) is amended by striking or section 36 and inserting section 36, or section 36B.
Section 15(h)(4)(A)(ii) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 644(h)(4)(A)(ii)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subclause (III), by striking and at the end;
in subclause (IV), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following new subclause:

subclause.text: small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans.

subsection.header: Offices of Small and Disadvantaged Business Utilization
subsection.text: Section 15(k) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 644(k)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking or 44 and inserting 36B, or 44;
by striking and 44 and inserting 36B, and 44 each place it appears; and
by striking or 36 and inserting 36, or 36B each place it appears.

subsection.text: Section 15(y) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 644(y)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking and small business concerns owned and controlled by women and inserting , small business concerns owned and controlled by women, and small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans each place it appears; and
in paragraph (4), by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:

subparagraph.text: The number (expressed as a percentage) and total dollar amount of awards made to small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans through sole source contracts and competitions restricted to small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans under section 36B.

subsection.text: Section 45(c)(1)(B) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 657r(c)(1)(B)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating clauses (iii) through (v) as clauses (iv) through (vi), respectively; and
by inserting after clause (ii) the following new clause:

clause.text: small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans;

subsection.text: Section 46 of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 657s) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking or 36 and inserting 36, or 36B; and
in subsection (e)—

clause.text: in subparagraph (D), by striking or at the end;
in subparagraph (E), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; or; and
by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:

subparagraph.text: with respect to a contract awarded under section 36B, is a small business concern owned and controlled by veterans.

clause.text: in subparagraph (E), by striking or at the end;
in subparagraph (F), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; or; and
by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:

subparagraph.text: if a subcontractor for a small business concern owned and controlled by veterans, is such a concern.
